seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day]. I sincerely appreciate the opportunities for professional growth that you have provided me during my time here. This was not an easy decision to make after much careful consideration.

I am fully committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining two weeks. I am ready and willing to complete all outstanding projects to the best of my ability. Please let me know how I can best assist in training my replacement or documenting my current responsibilities. I want to make this handover process as seamless as possible for the team.

I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for continued success in the future. Thank you once again for the valuable experience and support throughout my employment. I have learned a great deal from my colleagues here. I hope we can stay in touch professionally down the line.<turn|>
